headline: Claude Opus 4.6 drops in Windsurf with Arena Mode, but March 2-8 was lowkey quiet for new tool launches

picks.name: Windsurf Arena Mode
picks.tagline: Side-by-side AI model comparison right in your IDE
picks.summary: Windsurf added Arena Mode to let you pit models against each other blind-voted to find what actually works for YOUR code, not just benchmarks.

picks.name: Claude Opus 4.6
picks.tagline: 1M context window for serious coding work
picks.summary: Claude got smarter at long-context tasks & debugging unfamiliar codebases. 1M token window (beta) means you can actually keep massive projects in memory.

picks.name: Google Gemini workspace updates
picks.tagline: AI that reads your entire Google Drive & builds docs from it
picks.summary: Gemini in Workspace can now generate full docs, sheets & presentations by pulling context from your emails, chats & files. Basically turned Drive into an active knowledge base.

picks.name: Claude for Excel/PowerPoint shared context
picks.tagline: Pull data from Excel, turn it into slides, all in one session
picks.summary: Claude can now read spreadsheets & instantly translate results into presentation slides without copy-pasting. Teams can create reusable 'skills' for repetitive workflows.

watchNext.title: DeepSeek V4 (still waiting)
watchNext.why: fr everyone's been refreshing since March 2. Trillion-param model w/ 1M context supposed to crush GPT-5.4 on code. When it actually drops, it's gonna shift the whole market.

watchNext.title: Page Agent by Alibaba, Hermes Agent by NousResearch
watchNext.why: Lowkey dropped on GitHub trending mid-week. JavaScript GUI agents & adaptive AI frameworks starting to show how web automation & agentic systems are evolving fast.
